summary: Completed frontend testing of gallery slider feature on apartment detail pages. All 8 features tested and working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Uses existing seeded apartments apt-001 through apt-008 with 'images' arrays (4 images each)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery slider feature fully tested. All apartments have 4 images each. Navigation buttons (next/prev), thumbnail strip, image counter, visual indicator (orange ring), and loop functionality all working correctly. Fallback code for single 'image' field exists but not tested as all seed data has 'images' arrays.

gallery_slider_tests: Gallery shows multiple images (4 images each apartment) - PASS
Thumbnail strip shows all images (4 thumbnails) - PASS
Clicking thumbnail navigates to that image - PASS
Image counter shows correct position (e.g., '2 / 4') - PASS
Selected thumbnail has visual indicator (orange ring) - PASS
Gallery loops when reaching end (forward) - PASS
Gallery loops when reaching start (backward) - PASS
